name: Jewel Match Solitaire Winterscapes 3 - Collector's Edition
short_description: Warmed by winter's gentle magic, unwrap a cool Solitaire classic, A thousand levels to explore, Klondike, Spider – and much more. Through sparkling snowflakes reach new heights - Freecell and Yukon, such delights. Embrace the season, pure and clear, let Solitaire enchant your year!
detailed_description:
Experience the magic of winter with Jewel Match Solitaire Winterscapes 3 - Collector's Edition!  Dive into a thousand levels — play Klondike, Spider, and many more solitaire variations to your heart's content. Discover classic and unique variants like Lily Garden and Simonetta as you progress.

Journey through beautiful winter scenes transformed by the magic of the season — from a cozy cottage to a grand snow palace, each backdrop is a joy to discover. Complete quests to collect winter decor and bring each backdrop to life.

Choose from Standard, Challenging, Relaxed, and additional modes to match your preferred playstyle. Enjoy festive sounds and visuals throughout the game, making this the perfect holiday solitaire adventure. Join the fun and guide your cards to victory in Jewel Match Solitaire Winterscapes 3!

  • More than 1000 levels!

  • 6 classical Solitaire games such as Klondike, Spider or Freecell.

  • 18 additional Solitaire variants including Tiberius or Nabulio.

  • Restore 10 enchanting frosty locations

  • Play 4 different game modes: Normal, Hard, Relaxed and Timed.

  • Play supersize, challenge, sliding, match-2, and suit’n’rank bonus level.

  • Accomplish quests.

  • Choose between multiple card decks.

  • Unlock stunning wallpapers for your desktop.

  • Delight in a calming holiday soundtrack.
